translatedContent: # PM Claude Code Setup

originContent: [![Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/aakashg/pm-claude-code-setup?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/aakashg/pm-claude-code-setup/stargazers)

originContent: A production-ready Claude Code configuration for product managers. Drop these files into your project and Claude Code immediately understands PM work.
translatedContent: A production-ready Claude Code configuration for product managers. Drop these files into your project and Claude Code immediately understands PM work.

originContent: Includes a `CLAUDE.md` context file, 6 PM skills, and 4 templates. Takes 60 seconds to set up.
translatedContent: Includes a `CLAUDE.md` context file, 6 PM skills, and 4 templates. Takes 60 seconds to set up.

originContent: **This setup works standalone. The full PM Operating System goes further: 41+ skills, 7 sub-agent perspectives, a complete context library, launch templates, and sprint planning workflows refined over 100+ iterations.**
translatedContent: **This setup works standalone. The full PM Operating System goes further: 41+ skills, 7 sub-agent perspectives, a complete context library, launch templates, and sprint planning workflows refined over 100+ iterations.**

originContent: **[Get the full PM Operating System →](https://www.news.aakashg.com/p/pm-os)**
translatedContent: **[Get the full PM Operating System →](https://www.news.aakashg.com/p/pm-os)**

originContent: ## Quick Setup
translatedContent: ## Quick Setup

originContent: **Step 1:** Copy `CLAUDE.md` to your project root:
translatedContent: **Step 1:** Copy `CLAUDE.md` to your project root:

originContent: ```bash
translatedContent: ```bash

originContent: cp CLAUDE.md /path/to/your/project/
translatedContent: cp CLAUDE.md /path/to/your/project/

originContent: **Step 2:** Copy the skills folder:
translatedContent: **Step 2:** Copy the skills folder:

originContent: ```bash
translatedContent: ```bash

originContent: cp -r .claude/ /path/to/your/project/
translatedContent: cp -r .claude/ /path/to/your/project/

originContent: **Step 3:** Open Claude Code in your project. It loads automatically.
translatedContent: **Step 3:** Open Claude Code in your project. It loads automatically.

originContent: Done. Claude now knows you're a PM, follows your writing style, and writes PRDs on command.
translatedContent: Done. Claude now knows you're a PM, follows your writing style, and writes PRDs on command.

originContent: ## What the CLAUDE.md Does
translatedContent: ## What the CLAUDE.md Does

originContent: `CLAUDE.md` is a lean config file — not a manual. It tells Claude who you are, how to write, and what rules to follow. Fill in the `[FILL IN]` fields at the top (~2 minutes), and the rest works immediately:
translatedContent: `CLAUDE.md` is a lean config file — not a manual. It tells Claude who you are, how to write, and what rules to follow. Fill in the `[FILL IN]` fields at the top (~2 minutes), and the rest works immediately:

originContent: - **Your context** — role, product, metrics, OKRs, terminology
translatedContent: - **Your context** — role, product, metrics, OKRs, terminology

originContent: - **Writing rules** — enforced tone, banned words, output standards
translatedContent: - **Writing rules** — enforced tone, banned words, output standards

originContent: - **Sub-agent roles** — 6 reviewers in a table (engineer, designer, executive, skeptic, customer, data analyst)
translatedContent: - **Sub-agent roles** — 6 reviewers in a table (engineer, designer, executive, skeptic, customer, data analyst)

originContent: - **Output standards** — clarifying questions before generating, metrics with baselines, risks with mitigations
translatedContent: - **Output standards** — clarifying questions before generating, metrics with baselines, risks with mitigations

originContent: - **Skills reference** — points to `.claude/skills/` without duplicating their logic
translatedContent: - **Skills reference** — points to `.claude/skills/` without duplicating their logic

originContent: - **MCP connections** — your integrations (Notion, Jira, Slack, etc.)
translatedContent: - **MCP connections** — your integrations (Notion, Jira, Slack, etc.)

originContent: The file is intentionally under 60 lines. Claude follows short, specific instructions better than long ones.
translatedContent: The file is intentionally under 60 lines. Claude follows short, specific instructions better than long ones.

originContent: ## What the PRD Writer Skill Does
translatedContent: ## What the PRD Writer Skill Does

originContent: Say "write a PRD" or "create a PRD for [feature]" and Claude:
translatedContent: Say "write a PRD" or "create a PRD for [feature]" and Claude:

originContent: 1. Asks 3-5 clarifying questions first (never generates blind)
translatedContent: 1. Asks 3-5 clarifying questions first (never generates blind)

originContent: 2. Follows a structured format: hypothesis, problem, solution, metrics, non-goals
translatedContent: 2. Follows a structured format: hypothesis, problem, solution, metrics, non-goals

originContent: 3. Flags missing info with `[NEED: data from X]` placeholders
translatedContent: 3. Flags missing info with `[NEED: data from X]` placeholders

originContent: 4. Keeps it under 2 pages unless you ask for more
translatedContent: 4. Keeps it under 2 pages unless you ask for more

originContent: 5. Includes success metrics with specific numbers and guardrails
translatedContent: 5. Includes success metrics with specific numbers and guardrails

originContent: ## How to Get the Most Out of This Setup
translatedContent: ## How to Get the Most Out of This Setup

originContent: ### Chain Sub-Agents
translatedContent: ### Chain Sub-Agents

originContent: Write a PRD → "Review as engineer" → fix gaps → "Review as skeptic" → tighten assumptions → "Review as customer" → simplify the value prop. Three passes, three minutes, dramatically better spec.
translatedContent: Write a PRD → "Review as engineer" → fix gaps → "Review as skeptic" → tighten assumptions → "Review as customer" → simplify the value prop. Three passes, three minutes, dramatically better spec.

originContent: ### Use @ References
translatedContent: ### Use @ References

originContent: Don't paste docs into chat — point to them:
translatedContent: Don't paste docs into chat — point to them:

originContent: Read @templates/prd-template.md and use that structure.
translatedContent: Read @templates/prd-template.md and use that structure.

originContent: Summarize @meeting-notes/standup-03-04.md into action items.
translatedContent: Summarize @meeting-notes/standup-03-04.md into action items.

originContent: Compare @competitor-notes/notion.md against @competitor-notes/monday.md.
translatedContent: Compare @competitor-notes/notion.md against @competitor-notes/monday.md.

originContent: Claude reads the file on demand. Your context window stays clean.
translatedContent: Claude reads the file on demand. Your context window stays clean.

originContent: ### Use Plan Mode (Shift+Tab)
translatedContent: ### Use Plan Mode (Shift+Tab)

originContent: Toggle before complex tasks. Forces Claude to outline its approach before executing. You approve the plan, then it runs. Best for PRDs with open questions, multi-file edits, anything where "undo" is expensive.
translatedContent: Toggle before complex tasks. Forces Claude to outline its approach before executing. You approve the plan, then it runs. Best for PRDs with open questions, multi-file edits, anything where "undo" is expensive.

originContent: ### Set Up Hooks
translatedContent: ### Set Up Hooks

originContent: Unlike CLAUDE.md instructions (advisory), hooks run deterministically:
translatedContent: Unlike CLAUDE.md instructions (advisory), hooks run deterministically:

originContent: "Write a hook that spell-checks every file after I edit it"
translatedContent: "Write a hook that spell-checks every file after I edit it"

originContent: "Write a hook that blocks writes to /templates/"
translatedContent: "Write a hook that blocks writes to /templates/"

originContent: "Write a hook that runs a word count check — block any PRD over 1500 words"
translatedContent: "Write a hook that runs a word count check — block any PRD over 1500 words"
Configure via `/hooks` or `.claude/settings.json`. Exit code 0 = proceed, exit code 2 = block with feedback.

originContent: Configure via `/hooks` or `.claude/settings.json`. Exit code 0 = proceed, exit code 2 = block with feedback.

translatedContent: ### Session Management

originContent: ### Session Management

translatedContent: - **`/clear` between unrelated tasks.** Context bleed is the #1 quality killer.

originContent: - **`/clear` between unrelated tasks.** Context bleed is the #1 quality killer.
translatedContent: - **Cap conversations at ~50 exchanges.** Quality degrades past this.

originContent: - **Cap conversations at ~50 exchanges.** Quality degrades past this.
translatedContent: - **Use handoffs.** Before ending a long session: "Write a HANDOFF.md." Next session: "Read @HANDOFF.md and continue."

originContent: - **Use handoffs.** Before ending a long session: "Write a HANDOFF.md." Next session: "Read @HANDOFF.md and continue."
translatedContent: - **Run parallel sessions.** Multiple terminals, each with its own Claude instance and context window.

originContent: - **Run parallel sessions.** Multiple terminals, each with its own Claude instance and context window.
translatedContent: - **Resume sessions.** `claude --continue` for last session, `claude --resume` to pick from history.

originContent: - **Resume sessions.** `claude --continue` for last session, `claude --resume` to pick from history.

translatedContent: ### Make CLAUDE.md Self-Improving

originContent: ### Make CLAUDE.md Self-Improving

translatedContent: When Claude makes a mistake, correct it, then: "Add a rule to CLAUDE.md so you don't make that mistake again." Claude proposes the rule, you approve, it edits the file. Next session, the rule is loaded automatically. Prune quarterly.

originContent: When Claude makes a mistake, correct it, then: "Add a rule to CLAUDE.md so you don't make that mistake again." Claude proposes the rule, you approve, it edits the file. Next session, the rule is loaded automatically. Prune quarterly.

translatedContent: ### Customize the Skills

originContent: ### Customize the Skills

translatedContent: Skills ship with generic examples. Replace them with real examples from your product. A sprint planner that knows your team's velocity outperforms a generic one every time.

originContent: Skills ship with generic examples. Replace them with real examples from your product. A sprint planner that knows your team's velocity outperforms a generic one every time.

translatedContent: ### Feed in Real Artifacts

originContent: ### Feed in Real Artifacts

translatedContent: Don't describe your Slack thread — paste it. Don't summarize the user interview — paste the transcript. Skills extract and structure messy information; raw inputs produce the best output.

originContent: Don't describe your Slack thread — paste it. Don't summarize the user interview — paste the transcript. Skills extract and structure messy information; raw inputs produce the best output.

translatedContent: ### Quick Reference

originContent: ### Quick Reference
/clear              Reset context (CLAUDE.md reloads automatically)
translatedContent: /clear              Reset context (CLAUDE.md reloads automatically)

originContent: /hooks              Configure automation hooks
translatedContent: /hooks              Configure automation hooks

originContent: /init               Generate a starter CLAUDE.md from your project
translatedContent: /init               Generate a starter CLAUDE.md from your project

originContent: /permissions        Set tool access rules
translatedContent: /permissions        Set tool access rules

originContent: Shift+Tab           Toggle Plan Mode
translatedContent: Shift+Tab           Toggle Plan Mode

originContent: Esc                 Cancel current generation
translatedContent: Esc                 Cancel current generation

originContent: claude --continue   Resume last session
translatedContent: claude --continue   Resume last session

originContent: claude --resume     Pick a specific past session
translatedContent: claude --resume     Pick a specific past session

originContent: claude -p "prompt"  Non-interactive single prompt
translatedContent: claude -p "prompt"  Non-interactive single prompt

originContent: ## Troubleshooting
translatedContent: ## Troubleshooting

originContent: Common issues and fixes.
translatedContent: Common issues and fixes.

originContent: ### Claude doesn't seem to follow my CLAUDE.md instructions
translatedContent: ### Claude doesn't seem to follow my CLAUDE.md instructions

originContent: - **Check file location.** CLAUDE.md must be in your project root (the directory where you run `claude`). Claude Code loads it automatically from the working directory.
translatedContent: - **Check file location.** CLAUDE.md must be in your project root (the directory where you run `claude`). Claude Code loads it automatically from the working directory.

originContent: - **Check file size.** Beyond ~150 lines, Claude starts ignoring instructions. Prune aggressively. Move domain knowledge into skills.
translatedContent: - **Check file size.** Beyond ~150 lines, Claude starts ignoring instructions. Prune aggressively. Move domain knowledge into skills.

originContent: - **Check for conflicting instructions.** Contradictory rules produce unpredictable behavior. Audit for conflicts.
translatedContent: - **Check for conflicting instructions.** Contradictory rules produce unpredictable behavior. Audit for conflicts.

originContent: - **Restart the session.** Run `/clear` or start a new terminal. Claude loads CLAUDE.md at session start.
translatedContent: - **Restart the session.** Run `/clear` or start a new terminal. Claude loads CLAUDE.md at session start.

originContent: ### Skills aren't triggering
translatedContent: ### Skills aren't triggering

originContent: - **Verify the path.** Skills must be at `.claude/skills/<skill-name>/SKILL.md` (exact casing matters).
translatedContent: - **Verify the path.** Skills must be at `.claude/skills/<skill-name>/SKILL.md` (exact casing matters).

originContent: - **Check the trigger.** The SKILL.md needs a clear trigger phrase that matches how you're asking. If your SKILL.md says "triggers when user asks to write a PRD" but you say "draft a spec," Claude may not connect them.
translatedContent: - **Check the trigger.** The SKILL.md needs a clear trigger phrase that matches how you're asking. If your SKILL.md says "triggers when user asks to write a PRD" but you say "draft a spec," Claude may not connect them.

originContent: - **Test with an explicit request.** Try: "Use the prd-writer skill to write a PRD for X." If that works but natural language doesn't, refine your trigger description.
translatedContent: - **Test with an explicit request.** Try: "Use the prd-writer skill to write a PRD for X." If that works but natural language doesn't, refine your trigger description.

originContent: - **Check that SKILL.md isn't empty or malformed.** Open it and verify it has content.
translatedContent: - **Check that SKILL.md isn't empty or malformed.** Open it and verify it has content.

originContent: ### Claude forgets context mid-conversation
translatedContent: ### Claude forgets context mid-conversation

originContent: - **Context limits.** Long conversations degrade after ~50 exchanges. Use `/clear` and start fresh with a summary.
translatedContent: - **Context limits.** Long conversations degrade after ~50 exchanges. Use `/clear` and start fresh with a summary.

originContent: - **Use handoffs.** Before clearing, have Claude write a HANDOFF.md summarizing state, decisions, and next steps. Start the new session with "Read @HANDOFF.md and continue."
translatedContent: - **Use handoffs.** Before clearing, have Claude write a HANDOFF.md summarizing state, decisions, and next steps. Start the new session with "Read @HANDOFF.md and continue."

originContent: - **Avoid pasting huge docs.** Use `@` references instead of pasting entire documents into chat.
translatedContent: - **Avoid pasting huge docs.** Use `@` references instead of pasting entire documents into chat.

originContent: ### Hooks aren't running
translatedContent: ### Hooks aren't running

originContent: - **Check `.claude/settings.json`.** Hooks are configured there, not in CLAUDE.md.
translatedContent: - **Check `.claude/settings.json`.** Hooks are configured there, not in CLAUDE.md.

originContent: - **Check exit codes.** Hooks use exit 0 (proceed) and exit 2 (block + feedback). Other exit codes may cause unexpected behavior.
translatedContent: - **Check exit codes.** Hooks use exit 0 (proceed) and exit 2 (block + feedback). Other exit codes may cause unexpected behavior.

originContent: - **Check permissions.** Hook scripts need to be executable (`chmod +x`).
translatedContent: - **Check permissions.** Hook scripts need to be executable (`chmod +x`).

originContent: ### MCP servers won't connect
translatedContent: ### MCP servers won't connect

originContent: - **Verify credentials.** Most MCP servers require API keys or OAuth tokens. Confirm yours are current.
translatedContent: - **Verify credentials.** Most MCP servers require API keys or OAuth tokens. Confirm yours are current.

originContent: - **Check server config.** MCP connections are configured in Claude Code settings, not CLAUDE.md. CLAUDE.md only documents them for reference.
translatedContent: - **Check server config.** MCP connections are configured in Claude Code settings, not CLAUDE.md. CLAUDE.md only documents them for reference.

originContent: - **Restart Claude Code.** MCP connections initialize at startup.
translatedContent: - **Restart Claude Code.** MCP connections initialize at startup.

originContent: ### "I changed CLAUDE.md but nothing changed"
translatedContent: ### "I changed CLAUDE.md but nothing changed"

originContent: Claude reads CLAUDE.md at session start. Mid-session edits require a reload:
translatedContent: Claude reads CLAUDE.md at session start. Mid-session edits require a reload:

originContent: 1. Run `/clear` to reset context (CLAUDE.md reloads automatically)
translatedContent: 1. Run `/clear` to reset context (CLAUDE.md reloads automatically)

originContent: 2. Or start a new terminal session
translatedContent: 2. Or start a new terminal session
